feature_name: PTR fixes: remove floating refresh button and fix position:fixed children broken by will-change:transform

tasks.title: Remove will-change:transform from .ptr-content and revert .ptr-indicator to position:absolute
tasks.description: In PullToRefresh.svelte: (1) Remove `will-change: transform` from the `.ptr-content` CSS rule so it no longer creates a containing block that breaks position:fixed descendants. (2) Add `position: relative` to `.ptr-wrap` to establish a containing block for the indicator. (3) Change `.ptr-indicator` from `position: relative; height: 56px; margin-bottom: -56px` to `position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 56px` (remove margin-bottom). Update the CSS comment to reflect the new approach. All three changes are in PullToRefresh.svelte's <style> block only.
tasks.done_when: .ptr-content has no will-change declaration; .ptr-wrap has position:relative; .ptr-indicator uses position:absolute with top/left/right:0; pull gesture still works visually.

tasks.title: Add unit tests for will-change and ptr-btn absence
tasks.description: In PullToRefresh.test.ts: (1) Add a test asserting that .ptr-content does NOT have will-change:transform in its inline or computed styles after render. (2) Add a test asserting that no element with class .ptr-btn exists in the rendered DOM. (3) Ensure all existing PTR tests still pass.
tasks.done_when: Two new passing tests: one for will-change absence on .ptr-content, one for .ptr-btn absence. All existing tests pass. npm run test passes.

history.note: Feature initiated: two PTR bugs — (1) remove unwanted floating refresh button (.ptr-btn) from PullToRefresh.svelte, (2) fix will-change:transform on .ptr-content breaking position:fixed children like the add-task input
Advanced to discovery — routing to product-manager for requirements and exec plan
Advanced to design — routing to principal-engineer to produce technical design for the will-change:transform fix
Advanced to tasks — broke design into 2 implementation tasks: (1) CSS fixes in PullToRefresh.svelte, (2) unit tests for will-change and ptr-btn absence
Starting implementation — routing Task 1 (CSS fixes: remove will-change, revert ptr-indicator to position:absolute) to software-developer
Routing Task 2 (unit tests for will-change and ptr-btn absence) to software-developer
